name: Green Tomato Omelet with Basil
recipeIngredient: Light olive oil – for the pan
2 tbsp Fresh basil leaves or lovage leaves
Torn or finely sliced (or more if desired)
Sprigs of basil or lovage – for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the tomatoes in cornmeal or flour.
2. Heat enough oil in a 10-inch non-stick pan to cover the surface.
3. Fry the tomatoes briefly on each side until they are lightly colored. Do not let them get soft.
4. While frying the tomatoes, lightly beat the eggs with the scallions and basil leaves. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the tomatoes.
6. Let the eggs sit for about a minute, then gently shake the pan to loosen the bottom.
7. Cook over medium-low heat until the eggs are nicely colored on the bottom.
8. Slide the omelet onto a large plate.
9. Place the pan over the plate and invert it, returning it to the heat to cook the other side.
10. When done, turn the omelet out onto a serving plate and serve sliced in wedges garnished with fresh sprigs of the herb used.
